Lyrics.text:
Raha ho avy indray Jeso,
Moa ho faly ve ianao?
Indro efa kely sisa,
Moa ve vonona ianao?

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Moa ho androm-pifaliana
Sa ho hakiviana?
Raha ho avy indray Jesosy,
Moa vonona ve ianao?

Maso maro no hahita
Raha ho avy indray Jeso.
‘Reo anjely alin-kisa,
Moa ve hiaraka aminao?

’Reo tsara fanahy maty
Raha ho avy indray Jeso
No hitsangana aloha,
Ho anisany ve aho?
